central.//: Where the DBADash database lives. All collectors load here.
central.//auth: Leave user/password empty to use Windows/Integrated auth.

cms.//: Central Management Server + the registered-server group to fan out to.
cms.//alt: If you don't use CMS, set 'group' to null and list instances in mssqlInstances instead.

redshift.//password: Prefer the DBADASH_RS_PWD env var over storing it here.
redshift.//dsn: Optional: name of a preconfigured ODBC DSN. If set, host/port/etc are ignored.

alerting.//: Email active CRIT/WARN alerts. transport = 'smtp' or 'dbmail'.
alerting.//routeToOwners: Also email the app owner's address from cfg.AppOwners.
alerting.//dbmailProfile: Database Mail profile name (only used when transport='dbmail').
